'''lanocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:araara|araara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:araara|araara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lanocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || lænecheth || lænechej || lænechesh || læneche
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lanonochoth || lanonochoj || lanonochosh || lanonocho
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lanochoth || lanochoj || lanochosh || lanocho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lanofchofth || lanofchofj || lanofchofsh || lanofchof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lanochotho || lanochojo || lanochosho || lanochoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || lanochoth || lanochoj || lanochosh || lanocho
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lanochothol || lanochojol || lanochoshol || lanochokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lanochoothotho || lanochoojojo || lanochooshosho || lanochooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || lanochothon || lanochojon || lanochoshon || lanochokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lanochothooro || lanochojooro || lanochoshooro || lanochokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
